verses.text: Pasian' deihna tawh Jesuh Khrih' sawltak dingin a hong kiseh keimah Paul leh i sanggam Timoti in
Kolose khua-ah a om Pasian' mi ahi, Khrih sungah kiptakin a om sanggamte tungah lai ka hong khak uh hi. I Pa Pasian in note tungah dikna leh nopsakna thupha hong tungsak ta hen.

Note in Khrih Jesuh na muan'na uh leh Pasian' mite khempeuh na itna thu uh za ka hih manun note-a' ding thu ka hong ngetsak uh ciangin i Topa Jesuh Khrih' Pa Pasian tungah lungdamna ka ko tawntung uh hi
Thudang na zakma un, lungdamna thuman taktak na zak uh ciangin lametna na nei uh hi. Note-a' dingin vantungah a hong kikoihsak tua lametna hangin note in muan'na leh itna a nei na hi uh hi

Note in Pasian hong hehpihna thu za-in, ahi bangbangin na theih hun uha kipanin thupha na ngah uh bangin leitung midang khempeuh tungah zong lungdamna thu in thupha tun'in, leitung khempeuhah a kizel ahi hi
Hih thu pen, Khrih nasepna sungah kote' tangin citakin na a sem, kote' naseppih Epafras tung panin na zak uh ahi hi
Amah in, Kha Siangtho' piak itna na neihna uh zong, kote kiangah a hong gen hi
Tua bangin note' thu ka zak uh huna kipanin Pasian kiangah thu ka hong ngetsak uh a, kha thu tawh kisai pilna leh theihtelnate nei-in, Pasian' deihna na theihtheihna dingun ka hong ngetsak uh hi

Tua bang hi leh Topa' deihna bangin nungta-in, amah a lungkimsak ding thute bek na sem tawntung ding uh a, na gamtatnate uh a hoih bekbek hong hi-in, Pasian' thu na theihna uh hong khang semsem ding hi

Note in lungduai maitaii takin thuakzo-in, khuavak gamsungah a om Pasian' mite tawh nopsakna a ngahkhawm thei dingin a hong bawl i Pa tungah lungdamna na koh theihna dingun a minthang ama vangliatna in note tungah thahatna hong guan' ta hen
Amah in khuamial vangliatna panin eite hong honkhia-in, a lungmuan'huaina mun, a it a Tapa' ukna sungah hong koih a
tua a Tapa in eite hong khahkhia a, i mawhna hong kimaisak khinta hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Khrih in Pasian' Pianzia Khempeuh Nei

verses.text: Khrih pen a kimu theilo Pasian' lim hi a, a kipiangsak khempeuh lakah tapa upa pen ahi hi

Vantung leh leitungah a om na khempeuh, kha thu tawh kisai vangliatna, tote, mi ukte, aana neihnate-a kipan a kimuthei hita leh a kimu theilo hita leh na khempeuh, Pasian in amah zangin a piangsak hi. Leitunga kipanin huihlakah a om khempeuh dongin, Pasian in Khrih-a' dingin amahmah zangin a piangsak hi
Na khempeuh khat beek a om ma-in amah om khinta a, amah tawh a kipawl manin na khempeuh ama mun sansanah hoihtakin a omthei hi
Na khempeuhah amah a lianpen ahih theihna dingin, amah pen pawlpi ahi ama pumpi lutang hi a, pawlpi' nuntakna a kipatna hi a, sihna panin a kithosak kik Tapa cil ahi hi
Tua Tapa in Pasian' pian'zia a kimin a neihna ding, Pasian mahmah in a sehsa ahi hi

Pasian in a Tapa zangin na khempeuh ama kiangah a kaihkik ding a sehsa ahi hi. Tua ahih manin singlamteh tungah a Tapa a sihna hangin amah tawh kilemkik theihna ding hong omsak ahih manin, leitung, vantunga om khempeuh ama kiangah a hong tun'kik ahi hi
A beisa hunah note' lungsim gitlohna leh gamtatsiatna hangin Pasian tawh kigamla-in Pasian' gal na hi uh hi
Ahi zongin, a Tapa a pumpi mahmahin a hong sihna hangin note, a cidam, a siangtho, paubaan'na om hetloin ama kiangah hong laktheihna dingin Pasian in note ama lawmin a hong bawl khinta ahi hi

Ahi zongin note in lungdamna thu na zak cil lai-un na neih uh lametna panin ling hetloin, bulkip nei-in citakin na om paisuak ding uh ahi hi. Tua lungdamna thu mah keimah Paul in hilhin ka sepbel hi a, leitung mun khempeuhah a kihilh lungdamna thu mah ahi hi.
Tu-in ka pumpi-in ka thuakna tawh Khrih in ama pumpi ahi pawlpi-a' dingin a thuakding a kisam laiteng a kitangcingsak suak ka hih manin note-a' dingin ka thuakna thu-ah ka lung a dam hi
Pasian' thu a kicing takin note' phattuamna dingin a hilh dingin pawlpi nasem dingin Pasian in kei a hong bawl hi
Tua thuhilh ding pen a beisa hunah a ki-imcip thu hi a, ahi zongin tu-in Pasian' mite tungah a kipholak ta ahi hi

Pasian in mi khempeuh-a' dingin a koihcing hih a thupi a deihhuai a thusim pen ama mite tungah pholak ding a sawm ahi hi. Tua thusim in: Khrih tawh a kipawlte in Pasian tawh minthan'na ngahkhawm ding hi, cihna ahi hi
Tua ahih manin a milip tungah Khrih' thu ka hilh uh a, Khrih tawh a kipawlna uh hangin a milipin a khangcingin Pasian' omna-ah ka tun'pih theihna dingun a milip tungah hilhin ka genkhol uh hi
Hihbang a tangtun' theihna dingin Khrih in kei tungah a hong piak ka thahatna khempeuh zangin, nakpi takin na semin ka hanciam hi.
